name: What can AI actually do for SEO, and what can’t it do well?
description: AI is useful for research, clustering, and drafting, but it should not replace human strategy or fact-checking. It helps accelerate SEO work, not eliminate it.

mainEntity.name: What can AI actually do for SEO, and what can’t it do well?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI can help with keyword research, clustering topics, drafting outlines, and speeding up repetitive SEO tasks. It is much less reliable as a fully autonomous writer, strategist, or fact-checker, so human editing still matters.
acceptedAnswer.description: AI is useful for research, clustering, and drafting, but it should not replace human strategy or fact-checking. It helps accelerate SEO work, not eliminate it.
